description.value:
You use your Vectors to lift and hold a medium-sized or smaller target you can see within range, it must succed a strength saving throw or become lifted for the duration.

A creature that is lifted floats 5ft over the ground, has its speed reduced to 0, and has disadvantage on dexterity saving throws. A creature that cannot be unwillingly moved is immune to this condition. A creature who gains this condition makes a strength saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the condition on itself on a success. This condition can be ended on an affected creature by a jutsu or feature that removed physical conditions of the same rank as this jutsu's casting.

While concentrating on this jutsu, you may spend a bonus action to make an affected creature do one of the following:

  • Move: the target is moved up to 15ft towards a free space of your your choice within this jutsu's range.
  • Throw: the target is moved up to 30ft and takes falling damage as if it fell the full distance. A target can be thrown towards another creature within range, make a ranged ninjutsu attack against the other creature, it takes the same damage as the lifted creature on a hit, regardless of a hit or miss the lift ends and the lifted creature ends its movement on a free space within 5ft of it.

At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the number of targets by 1, and their maximum size by 1 (medium>large>huge>gargantuan).
